title: Through the Lens
description: This is a modpack containing mods and shaders to make Minecraft look like found footage while not being horror and still keeping vanilla look.
body:
Through the Lens is a cinematic Minecraft experience that transforms the game into something that feels recorded. Inspired by found footage, bodycam aesthetics, and immersive realism — this modpack recreates the feel of looking through a handheld camera, but without horror.

Perfect for survival gameplay, solo or multiplayer, it’s about living in the world — not escaping it.
